keys.backupCreated: Kua waihanga, kua tikiake hoki te pūrua matua ✓
keys.restored: Kua whakaora te pūrua matua ✓ Kua whakaurunga ngā matua ki te rorohiko o te wā
keys.noBackup: Kāore he pūrua whakamuna mō tēnei pūkete
keys.missingPublicKey: Kei te ngaro tētahi matua tūmatawhānui i te pūrua

keySetup.title: Whakaritea ō matua pūrere
keySetup.description: Kāore anō tēnei pūrere e mau ana i tō matua tūmataiti. Kawemai he pūrua kua whakamunatia ki te kupuhipa, whakaputa rānei he huinga matua hou (ka taea e koe te pānui i ngā karere hou mai i tēnei wā).
keySetup.chooseFile: Kōwhiria he kōnae ka whakauru i te kupuhipa.
keySetup.imported: Kua kawemai te matua tūmataiti ki tēnei pūrere. Ka taea e koe te pānui i ngā karere tawhito ināianei.
keySetup.enterPassword: Whakauruhia tō kupuhipa pūkete kia taea ai e mātou te pūrua haumaru i ō matua.

auth.headline: Karere haumaru mō ngā tāngata katoa, i ngā wāhi katoa
auth.description: Whakamuna pito-ki-pito, whakamaoritanga ki ngā reo 100+, ngā karere e ngaro ana, me ngā waea ataata/ororongo.

feature.disappearing: Ngā karere e ngaro ana me ngā pānui panui
feature.privacy: Tuatahi ki te tūmataiti. Ō raraunga, tō mana.
feature.seePlans: Tirohia ngā mahere me ngā utu

hero.line1: Karere haumaru mō ngā tāngata katoa, i ngā wāhi katoa — me te
hero.sub: Tikina he nama waea haumaru koreutu hei waea me te tuku karere puta noa i te ao mā te Wi-Fi, raraunga rānei. Kia koa ki te whakamuna pito-ki-pito, ngā karere e ngaro ana, me ngā waea ataata/ororongo HD — me ngā taputapu hanga-i-roto hei āwhina i a koe ki te noho hono puta noa i ngā rohe.
hero.freeNote: He koreutu te waea me te tuku karere taketake. E hiahia ana ngā āhuatanga AI matatau me ngā āhuatanga utu nui ki te whakahou.

feat.encryption: Whakamuna pito-ki-pito, kei te whakakā tonu
feat.translate: Wewete i ngā ārai reo i ō kōrero
feat.disappear: Ngā karere e ngaro ana me ngā pānui panui
feat.privacy: Tuatahi ki te tūmataiti. Ō raraunga, tō mana.

auth.desktopTip: Kei te rorohiko puku? Tāwhai ki tō waea kia tikina te taupānga.
auth.scanHelper: Kei te rorohiko puku? Tāwhai ki tō waea kia tikina te taupānga.
auth.subhead: Karere tūmataiti, whakamuna, me te whakamaoritanga — inamata.
auth.tip: Tohu: Whakamahia te pūkete ōrite i te paetukutuku me te pūkere. Ka noho whakamau ō karere.
auth.scanHint: Tāwhai ki te tikiake i te taupānga, whakatuwhera rānei i tō pūtirotiro.

registration.passwordDescription: Ita rawa 6 pūāhua. Whakamahia he kupuhipa kaha, ahurei.
registration.smsConsent: Mā te waihanga pūkete, ka whakaae koe ki te whiwhi whakamōhio SMS e pā ana ki ō mahi Chatforia (pēnei i ngā karere mai i ētahi atu kaiwhakamahi). Ka tāpiri pea ngā reiti karere me ngā raraunga. Ka taea e koe te whakakore i ngā wā katoa i ngā Tautuhinga.

auth.addRecipient: Tāpiri he kaiwhiwhi i runga ake hei tīmata…
auth.oneRecipient: Whakauruhia kia kotahi noa te kaiwhiwhi mō nāianei.
auth.enterValidRecipient: Whakauruhia he ingoa whakapā kua tiakina, he nama waea rānei.
auth.sendFailed: I rahua te tuku. Tirohia te papatohu mō ngā taipitopito.

home.title: Kāinga
home.subheader: Tukuna he karere hei tīmata i tētahi kōrero.

chat.selectPrompt: Kōwhiria he kuputuhi, rūma kōrero rānei hei tīmata i te kōrerorero
chat.emptySubtitle: Tukuna he karere hei tīmata i tētahi kōrero.

chat.unlockToView: Whakatuwherahia tō matua kia kite i tēnei karere

messageInput.premiumLimit: Te rohe whakakore aunoa mō te Premium he 30 rā. Kua whakakīhia ki 30r.

errors.rateLimit: Kei te tuku karere tere rawa koe. Me whakaroa.
errors.validation: Hapa whaimana. Tirohia tō karere ka whakamātau anō.
errors.failedToSend: I rahua te tuku. Ka taea e koe te whakamātau anō i te mirumiru i rahua.

profile.title: Kōtaha Kaiwhakamahi
profile.mustLogin: Me takiuru koe ki te tiro i ngā tautuhinga.
profile.showOriginalWithTranslation: Whakaatu i te kuputuhi taketake me ngā karere kua whakamaoritia
profile.showOriginalAndTranslation: Whakaatu i te taketake i te taha o te whakamaoritanga
profile.disappearingMessages: Whakahohe i ngā karere e ngaro ana
profile.autoDeleteSeconds: Ngā hēkona ki te whakakore aunoa
profile.saveError: Hapa: Kāore i taea te tiaki i ngā tautuhinga
profile.avatarError: I rahua te tukuake i te ātari
profile.noPrivateKey: Kāore he matua tūmataiti i tēnei pūrere hei kaweake.
profile.setBackupPassword: Whakaritea he kupuhipa hei whakamuna i tō pūrua:
profile.enterBackupPassword: Whakauruhia te kupuhipa mō tēnei pūrua:
profile.importSuccess: Kua kawemai te matua tūmataiti ki tēnei pūrere.
profile.importFailed: I rahua te kawemai i te matua (kupuhipa hē, kōnae kino rānei).
profile.keysRotated: Kua whakaputa he huinga matua hou, kua tukuake hoki te matua tūmatawhānui.
profile.rotateFailed: I rahua te huri i ngā matua.
profile.keyDisclaimer: Kāore tō matua tūmataiti e wehe atu i tēnei pūrere. Kaweake he kape kua whakamunatia ki te kupuhipa hei whakaora i runga i tētahi atu pūrere.
profile.themeFreeNotice: Kei runga koe i te Koreutu — whakamahia ngā kōwhiringa Sun/Moon tere i raro. Whakahou kia whakatuwhera i ētahi atu kaupapa.
profile.backupDesc: Pūrua tō matua whakamuna kia taea ai te whakaora haumaru i ō karere i tētahi atu pūrere.
profile.privacyBlurEnabled: Whakapō i ngā karere mā te taunoa
profile.privacyBlurOnUnfocus: Whakapō ina kore e arotahi te taupānga
profile.planLoading: Kei te uta i tō mahere…
profile.planLoadFailed: I rahua te uta i tō mahere.
profile.freePlanCopy: Kei runga koe i te mahere koreutu. Whakahou kia whakatuwhera i ētahi atu āhuatanga pēnei i ngā pūrua, nama tāpiri, me ngā kōwhiringa tūmataiti matatau.
profile.portalOpenFailed: Kāore i taea te whakatuwhera i te tauranga nama. Tāpiri whakamātau anō.
profile.notifyOnCopy: Whakamōhio mai mēnā ka tārua taku karere
profile.loadFailed: I rahua te uta i te kōtaha
profile.followHint: Ka puta ā rātou kōrero ki tō whāngai Whai mēnā ka whakairi rātou ki te hunga Kaitāngata (Tūmatawhānui rānei).
profile.followsYou: Kei te whai i a koe
profile.sectionCrashedTitle: I rahua te wāhanga ki te uta
profile.sectionCrashedBody: I hē tētahi mea i tēnei wāhanga.
profile.callTextForwardingDescription: Whakawhiti i ngā waea me ngā karere taumai ki tō waea, īmēra rānei kua whakamanatia. Ka taea e ngā waea/karere puta te whakaatu i tō nama Chatforia.
profile.forwardSaveFailed: I rahua te tiaki i ngā tautuhinga
profile.errE164: Whakauruhia he nama waea E.164 tika (hei tauira +15551234567).
profile.errSmsDest: Kōwhiria kia kotahi neke atu te ūnga (waea, īmēra rānei).
profile.errQuietHours: Me noho ngā hāora ata i waenganui i te 0 me te 23.
profile.ageBandHint: Ka penapena mātou i tētahi awhe pakeke anake (kāore i tō rā whānau tika). Ka whakamahia tēnei hei pupuri i ngā whakahono Kōrero Matapōkere kia tika.
profile.wantsAgeFilter: Whakamahia te whakataurite pakeke i roto i te Kōrero Matapōkere
profile.wantsAgeFilterDesc: Ina whakakā, ka ngana mātou ki te whakahono i a koe ki ngā tāngata kei roto i ngā awhe pakeke hototahi.
profile.partnerAgeBands: Ko wai ka taea te whakahono ki a koe?
profile.partnerAgeBandsDesc: Ka whakahono tonu ngā taiohi ki ētahi atu taiohi anake. Kāore e taea te whakahono ngā pakeke ki ngā taiohi.
profile.teenMatchingNote: Mō te haumarutanga, ka whakahono ngā pūkete i te awhe pakeke 13–17 ki ētahi atu pūkete 13–17 anake i roto i te Kōrero Matapōkere.
profile.foriaRemember: Waiho mā Ria e maumahara ngā mea e kōrero ai koe ki a ia
profile.foriaRememberDesc: Ina whakakā tēnei, ka taea e Foria te whakamahi i ō kōrero Kōrero Matapōkere o mua (ki a koe anake) hei pupuri i te kōrero e rere ana. Ka taea e koe te whakaweto i ngā wā katoa.
profile.voicemailAutoDeleteDays: Whakakore aunoa i ngā waea reo i muri i (ngā rā)
profile.voicemailForwardEmail: Whakawhiti waea reo ki te īmēra
profile.voicemailForwardEmailPlaceholder: Īmēra hei tuku whakamōhio waea reo
profile.voicemailGreetingTextDesc: Ka whakamahia ina kāore e wātea tō kupu whakatau ororongo.
profile.voicemailGreetingUploaded: Kua tukuake angitu te kupu whakatau waea reo
profile.voicemailGreetingUploadError: I rahua te tukuake i te kupu whakatau waea reo
profile.voicemailNote: Ka penapenahia ngā waea reo mai i ō nama Chatforia ki tō pouakauru Waea Reo. Ka taea e koe te whakahohe i te whakamaoritanga me te whakawhiti i ngā mahere e tautokona ana.
profile.portHint: E hiahia ana koe ki te pupuri i tō nama o nāianei? Ka taea e koe te kawe ki roto i Chatforia Wireless.

esim.title: Chatforia eSIM
esim.desc: Tikina he raraunga pūkere mō Chatforia ina kei tawhiti koe i te Wi-Fi.

wireless.title: Chatforia Wireless
wireless.description: Whakahaere i tō mahere waea pūkere Chatforia, ngā nama, whakawhiti, me te kawe nama.

options.heading: Kōwhiria me pēhea te whakamahi i a Chatforia
options.subheading: Ka taea e koe te tiki he nama Chatforia hou, kawe rānei i tō nama o nāianei mai i tētahi kaiwhakarato atu.
options.portNumber: Kawe i tō nama o nāianei ki roto i Chatforia Wireless

port.heading: Kawe i tō nama o nāianei
port.subheading: Nekehia tō nama waea o nāianei mai i tō kaiwhakarato o nāianei ki roto i Chatforia. Kia ōrite ngā taipitopito ki tō pūkete kaiwhakarato kia kore ai e whakaroa.
port.fullNameLabel: Ingoa tūturu i runga i te pūkete
port.success: Kua tukuna te tono kawe! Ka whakamōhio tonu mātou ki a koe.

status.heading: Tūnga kawe
status.subheading: Aroturuki i te tūnga o ō tono kawe nama.
status.loadError: I rahua te uta i ngā tono kawe.

wireless.dataLow: Kei te iti haere ō raraunga.
wireless.expiresIn: Ka pau i roto i {{days}} rā
wireless.exhausted: Kua pau ō raraunga. Hokona he pōkai hou kia haere tonu ai te whakamahi raraunga pūkere.

family.title: Whānau
family.loading: Kei te uta i ngā taipitopito whānau…

error.load: I rahua te uta i ngā taipitopito whānau.
error.invite: Kāore i taea te waihanga i tētahi powhiri. Kia mōhio ko koe te rangatira whānau ka whakamātau anō.
error.checkout: Kāore i taea te tīmata i te utu mō tētahi mahere Whānau. Tāpiri whakamātau anō.

billing.myPlanError: Kāore i taea te uta i tō mahere.
billing.myPlanLoading: Kei te uta i tō mahere…
billing.freePlanCopy: Kei runga koe i te mahere koreutu. Whakahou kia whakatuwhera i ētahi atu āhuatanga.
billing.portalError: Kāore i taea te whakatuwhera i te tauranga nama i tēnei wā.
billing.cancelNowHelp: Ka taea e koe te whakahaere, whakakore rānei i tō ohaurunga i te tauranga nama, whakakore tonu rānei i raro.
billing.cancelNowConfirm: E pono ana koe ki te whakakore tonu i tō mahere? Kāore e taea te whakakore i tēnei mahi.
billing.cancelNowError: Kāore i taea te whakakore i tō mahere i tēnei wā. Tāpiri whakamātau anō, whakamahia rānei te Whakahaere nama.

none.title: Kāore anō he whānau i whakaritea
none.body: Hei waihanga i tētahi Whānau Chatforia me tētahi puna raraunga tiritiri, tīmatahia he mahere Whānau.

data.heading: Puna raraunga tiritiri
data.caption: Ka tiritiri katoa ngā mema i tēnei puna. Ka whakatūpato mātou i a koe i te wa e tata ana koe ki tō rohe.

invite.title: Powhiri mema hou
invite.body: Tukuna he īmēra, hononga rānei hei powhiri i tētahi ki roto i tō puna raraunga whānau tiritiri.
invite.expiryHint: Ka pau tēnei hononga i muri i ētahi rā. Ka taea tonu e koe te waihanga i tētahi hou.

join.title: Uru ki tētahi whānau
join.body: Kua powhirihia koe ki te uru ki tētahi Whānau Chatforia me te tiritiri i tā rātou puna raraunga.
join.cta: Whakaae ka uru ki te whānau
join.ctaLogin: Takiuru ka uru ki te whānau
join.success: Kua uru koe ki tēnei whānau. Kei te tiritiri koe i tā rātou puna raraunga ināianei.
join.error: Kāore i taea te tāpiri i a koe ki tēnei whānau. Ka hē pea te powhiri, kua pau rānei.

premium.heading: Haere ki Premium
premium.description: Whakatuwhera i ngā āhuatanga mana me te tango pānuitanga.

upgrade.title: Whakahou
upgrade.h1Subtitle: Tīmata ki tō mātou mahere koreutu, pānuitanga-tautokona. Haere kore-pānuitanga me Plus, whakatuwhera rānei i ngā āhuatanga mana katoa me Premium.
upgrade.subtitle: Kōwhiria he mahere taupānga, tāpiri pōkai raraunga mō koe, tohaina raraunga ki tō whānau rānei — katoa mai i tētahi wāhi.
upgrade.subtitle.app: Tīmata ki tō mātou mahere koreutu, pānuitanga-tautokona. Haere kore-pānuitanga me Plus, whakatuwhera rānei i ngā āhuatanga mana katoa me Premium.
upgrade.subtitle.mobile: Tāpiri raraunga eSIM ā-ao kia haere tonu a Chatforia ahakoa kei tawhiti koe i te Wi-Fi.
upgrade.subtitle.family: Waihanga he puna raraunga tiritiri mō tō whānau me te whakahaere i te whakamahinga a te katoa mai i tētahi wāhi.
upgrade.benefitsLine: Whakatuwhera i ngā āhuatanga mana me te tango pānuitanga.

scheduleBanner.title: Ka mutu te ohaurunga
scheduleBanner.body: Ka hoki koe ki Koreutu i

free.title: Koreutu
free.desc: Tīmata karere mō te koreutu. Tino pai mēnā kei te whakamātau noa koe i a Chatforia.

features.chat: Kōrero 1:1 me te rōpū wā-tūturu, me ngā waea ororongo me ataata
features.media: Tohaina whakaahua, karere reo, me ngā ataata poto
features.ai: Whakautu atamai AI me te whakamaoritanga inamata (whakamahinga tika)
features.disappearing: Ngā karere e ngaro ana me ngā mana tūmataiti taketake
features.ads: Koreutu tonu me ngā pānuitanga i roto i te taupānga

free.ctaPublic: Tīmata – haere tonu ki te takiuru

plus.title: Plus
plus.desc: Ngā mea taketake katoa, kāore he pānuitanga. Tino pai mō te karere me te waea o ia rā.

features.allFree: Ngā mea katoa i roto i Koreutu, kāore he pānuitanga
features.forwarding: Whakawhiti waea me karere ki tō nama waea tūturu
features.history: Hītori karere roa ake (tae atu ki te 6 marama)
features.support: Tautoko tere ake ina hē tētahi mea

plus.ctaPublic: Tikina Plus – haere tonu ki te takiuru

premiumMonthly.title: Premium (Ā-marama)
premiumMonthly.desc: Te wheako Chatforia katoa: ngā taputapu mana AI, whakaritenga, me te tautoko matua.

features.plusAll: Ngā mea katoa i roto i Plus
features.themes: Whakatuwhera i ngā kaupapa tae premium katoa me ngā whakaritenga taupānga
features.ai: Ngā taputapu mana AI anake mō Premium mō ngā whakatika, whakautu atamai, me ngā whakarāpopoto
features.support: Tautoko matua ina tino hiahia koe

premiumMonthly.ctaPublic: Whakatuwhera Premium – haere tonu ki te takiuru

premiumAnnual.title: Premium (Ā-tau)
premiumAnnual.desc: Tiaki ake ina utua ā-tau — tae atu ki ngā kaupapa tae tāpiri, ngā taputapu AI, me te tautoko matua.

features.allPremium: Ngā mea katoa i roto i Premium Ā-marama — tae atu ki ngā kaupapa tae tāpiri
features.save25: Tiaki tata ki te 30% i whakaritea ki te utu ā-marama
features.bestFor: Tino pai mō ngā kaiwhakamahi mana, kaimahi mamao, me ngā kaihaere nui

premiumAnnual.ctaPublic: Tiaki 30% me te ā-tau – haere tonu ki te takiuru
premiumAnnual.disclaimer: Ka utua i mua. Whakakore i ngā wā katoa. Kāore he utu huna.

marketing.premiumMonthlyDesc: Ngā āhuatanga katoa, ngā oro mōrena, me ngā taputapu mana AI.
marketing.annualDisclaimer: Ka utua i mua. Whakakore i ngā wā katoa. Kāore he utu huna.

mobile.title: Chatforia Waea pūkere (pōkai raraunga eSIM)
mobile.subtitle: Tāpiri raraunga ā-ao kia haere tonu a Chatforia ahakoa kāore he Wi-Fi. Ka whakarite aunoa ngā utu i runga i tō whenua me tō moni.
mobile.subtitle.detail: Kōwhiria tētahi pōkai raraunga ā-ao kotahi kia haere tonu a Chatforia ina haere koe, i tawhiti rānei i te Wi-Fi.
mobile.note: Kāore mātou e hoko i ngā pōkai raraunga i raro i te 3 GB.

features.heavyUse: Raraunga tere mō te whakamahi nui
features.throttle: Ka pōturi pea ngā tere i muri i te whakamahi nui

disclaimer.devices: E hiahia ana ngā pōkai raraunga eSIM ki tētahi pūrere hototahi eSIM me te kore maukati. Ka rerekē te wātea i runga i te tauira waea, kaiwhakarato, me te whenua. Ka rerekē te kapi me ngā tere i runga i te rohe.

small.title: Pōkai tīmatanga
small.desc: Kei roto 3 GB o raraunga tere — tino pai mō te karere māmā me ngā waea ōnaianei.
small.bestFor: Haerenga poto, karere māmā, me ngā waea ōnaianei

medium.title: Pōkai kaihaere
medium.desc: Kei roto 5 GB o raraunga tere mō ngā haerenga, haerenga mahi, me ngā waea VoIP auau.
medium.bestFor: Haerenga wiki, ngā waea VoIP auau, me ngā mahere

large.title: Pōkai mana
large.desc: Kei roto 10 GB o raraunga tere mō te kōrero nui, waea, me te ataata i runga i te whatunga Chatforia.
large.bestFor: Kōrero nui, waea, ataata, me te whakamahi hotspot
large.aria: Hokona pōkai raraunga eSIM Kaiwhakamahi Mana

compare.title: Whakataurite i ngā pōkai raraunga eSIM
compare.disclaimer: Ka whakawhirinaki te whakamahinga raraunga tūturu ki te āhua o tō whakamahi i a Chatforia (reo, ataata, pāho, me ētahi atu taupānga i runga i tō waea).

family.title: Whānau Chatforia (raraunga tiritiri)
family.subtitle: Tohaina tētahi puna raraunga kotahi puta noa i tō whānau. Kotahi te nama, maha ngā pūkete Chatforia, kapi ā-ao.

small.title: Whānau Iti
small.desc: Kei roto 20 GB o raraunga tere tiritiri — pai mō ngā kaiwhakamahi māmā 2–3.

medium.title: Whānau Waenga
medium.desc: Kei roto 40 GB o raraunga tere tiritiri — tino pai mō ngā mema kaha 3–5.

large.title: Whānau Nui
large.desc: Kei roto 80 GB o raraunga tere tiritiri — mō ngā whānau mana e noho tuihono tonu ana.

feature.shared: Puna raraunga tiritiri mō tō whānau
feature.members: Powhiri tae atu ki te 4 mema tāpiri
feature.manage: Whakahaere i ngā rohe mō ia mema
feature.topUp: Tāpiri pōkai anō i ngā wā katoa
feature.fairUse: Kei raro i te kaupapa whakamahinga tika me ngā rohe rohe

family.disclaimer: Ka waihanga, ka whakakī rānei ngā pōkai whānau i tētahi puna raraunga tiritiri. Ka taea e koe te powhiri me te tango i ngā mema i ngā wā katoa.
family.footnote: Ka tiritiri ngā pōkai whānau i tētahi puna raraunga kotahi puta noa i ngā pūkete Chatforia kua hono. Ka whakawhirinaki te wātea me ngā rohe ki tō whenua me ngā ture rohe.

why.title: He aha i huri ai ngā tāngata ki Chatforia
why.subtitle: Ka hoatu e Chatforia he nama waea tūturu, whakamaoritanga atamai, me tētahi ara mārama ki te haere kore-pānuitanga ina kua reri koe.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Ngā pānuitanga māmā ake i runga i Koreutu, he whakahou Plus ngāwari ina kua reri koe, me ngā taputapu Premium kāore e whakaratohia e TextNow.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: Taupānga hou, hoahoa tuatahi-ki-te-ao, me te whakamaoritanga hanga-i-roto kaua i te whakawhiti waea tawhito.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs ngā taupānga kōrero
messengers.body: Tukuna karere ki ngā nama waea tūturu — ehara i ngā kaiwhakamahi taupānga anake — me te AI me te tūnga kua hanga-i-roto. Pai mēnā kei te haere mai koe mai i ngā taupānga pēnei i TextFree, TextMe rānei.

why.tableTitle: Me pēhea te whakataurite a Chatforia

history.textnow: Ka rerekē i runga i te pūkete
history.voice: Whakawhāiti / i runga i te pūkete

why.disclaimer: I runga i ngā mōhiohio e wātea ana ki te iwi whānui, ka rerekē pea i roto i te wā. He rite tonu ngā taupānga tuku-karere koreutu pēnei i TextFree, TextMe ki a TextNow.

free.q: He koreutu tonu te mahere Koreutu?
free.a: Ae. Kei roto i te mahere Koreutu he nama Chatforia, waea, me te karere me ngā pānuitanga. Ka taea e koe te noho ki Koreutu i ngā wā katoa e hiahia ana koe, whakahou rānei ki te tango i ngā pānuitanga me te whakatuwhera i ētahi atu āhuatanga.

plusPremium.q: He aha te rerekētanga i waenganui i Plus me Premium?
plusPremium.a: Ka tango a Plus i ngā pānuitanga me te whakaroa i tō hītori karere — tino pai mō te whakamahi ia rā. Ka tāpiri a Premium i ngā whakaritenga tāpiri, ngā taputapu AI mō ngā whakatika me ngā whakautu, me te tautoko matua mō ngā kaiwhakamahi nui.

esim.q: Kei hea e mahi ana ngā pōkai raraunga eSIM?
esim.a: Ka whakamahi a Chatforia Waea pūkere i te kapi eSIM ā-ao. Ka whakawhirinaki te wātea ki tō whenua me tō pūrere. Ka kite koe i ngā kōwhiringa e tautokona ana i te wā o te whakahohe i roto i te taupānga.

cancel.q: Ka taea e au te whakakore, huri rānei i ngā mahere i ngā wā katoa?
cancel.a: Ae. Ka taea e koe te whakahaere, whakakore rānei i tō ohaurunga mai i te whārangi nama i roto i te taupānga. Ka whai mana ngā huringa i te mutunga o tō wā nama o nāianei.

family.q: Me pēhea te mahi a ngā pōkai Whānau?
family.a: Ka waihanga ngā pōkai Whānau i tētahi puna raraunga tiritiri puta noa i ngā pūkete Chatforia maha. Ka utu tētahi tangata i te nama, ā, ka taea e koe te powhiri, tango rānei i ngā mema me te whakarite rohe mō ia tangata.

gettingStarted.title: Tīmata
gettingStarted.subtitle: He tauhou ki Chatforia? Ko tēnei ara tīmata tere e whakaatu ana i ngā mea matua kia whai hua koe i roto i ngā meneti torutoru.

alert.text: Ka tipu tēnei aratohu i te wā e whakarewa ana mātou i ngā āhuatanga hou. Mēnā kei te ngaro tētahi mea, whakamōhio mai mā te

section2.title: 2) Tīmata karere
section2.item1: Waihanga he DM, Rōpū rānei ka tukuna tō karere tuatahi.
section2.item2: Whakamahia te whakamaoritanga inamata ki te kōrero puta noa i ngā reo 100+.
section2.item3: Whakamātauria ngā karere e ngaro ana me ngā pānui panui i Kōtaha → Tūmataiti.

section3.title: 3) Haere tonu
section3.item1: Ka taea e koe te whakahou ki tētahi mahere utu i ngā wā katoa i roto i te taupānga.
section3.item2: Ina kua takiuru koe, ka taea e koe te hono i ētahi atu pūrere me te whakarite i ngā pūrua whakamuna mai i ngā Tautuhinga i roto i te taupānga.

account.q: Me pēhea te waihanga, whakaora rānei i taku pūkete?
account.a: Tikiake te taupānga, whakamahia rānei te paetukutuku, pāwhiri “Waihanga pūkete”, whakamana i tō īmēra/waea. Ki te whakaora, whakamahia “Kua wareware ki te kupuhipa”.

privacy.a: Ae. He whakamuna pito-ki-pito mā te taunoa ngā karere me ngā waea. Ko koe me te kaiwhiwhi anake ka taea te pānui.

translate.q: Me pēhea te mahi a te whakamaoritanga inamata?
translate.a: Whakahohe “Whakamaori aunoa” i ngā Tautuhinga → Āhuatanga & Reo. Ka whakamaori mātou i runga i te pūrere i ngā wā e tautokona ana, mā ngā API haumaru me ngā raraunga iti rawa rānei.

contact.a: Taunakitanga mai ki a mātou i support@chatforia.com. Tāpiri whakaahua mata me tō putanga taupānga.

contact.title: Whakapā Mai
contact.successMsg: Mauruuru — ka whakautu tō mātou roopu mā te īmēra.
contact.errorSend: Kāore i taea te tuku. Īmēra support@chatforia.com.

intro.body: E whakamārama ana tēnei Kaupapahere Tūmataiti i te āhua o te kohikohi, whakamahi, me te tohatoha a Chatforia (“mātou”, “mātou”) i ngā mōhiohio ina whakamahi koe i ā mātou taupānga me ngā ratonga. Kua hoahoatia e mātou a Chatforia ki te whakaiti i ngā raraunga ka taea e mātou te uru atu.

infoWeCollect.title: Ngā mōhiohio e kohikohi ana mātou
infoWeCollect.account: Mōhiohio pūkete (hei tauira īmēra/waea) hei waihanga me te haumaru i tō pūkete.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Ihirangi whakamuna (karere/waea) he whakamuna pito-ki-pito; kāore e taea e mātou te pānui.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Tātari/whakamahinga pēnei i ngā rangitaki tūpono, momo pūrere, tātari ā-papa rānei hei whakapai ake i te mahinga.

sms.title: Ngā nama waea pūkere me SMS
sms.body: Mēnā ka whiriwhiri koe ki te whakarato i tētahi nama waea pūkere, ka whakamahia e mātou ki te whakahohe i ngā āhuatanga pēnei i te whakamana pūkete, ngā mātakite takiuru, me te karere kaiwhakamahi-ki-kaiwhakamahi mā SMS i ngā wā e tautokona ana. Ka taea e mātou te tuku karere SMS whakawhiti e pā ana ki tō pūkete me ngā mahi i runga i Chatforia. Ka taea e koe te whakakore i te whiwhi karere SMS i ngā wā katoa mā te whakautu ki tētahi kupu whakakore e tautokona ana (pēnei i “STOP”) ki te whakarereke rānei i ō manakohanga whakamōhio i roto i te taupānga. Kāore mātou e hoko i tō nama waea, e whakamahi rānei mō te hokohoko kore e pā ana.
sms.addRecipient: Tāpiri he kaiwhiwhi i runga ake hei tīmata…

howWeUse.title: Me pēhea te whakamahi mātou i ngā mōhiohio
howWeUse.provide: Whakarato me te haumaru i te ratonga (whakamana, tātari spam/tūkino).
howWeUse.improve: Whakapai ake i ngā āhuatanga (kounga whakamaoritanga, pono).

sharing.title: Tohatoha
sharing.body: Kāore mātou e hoko raraunga whaiaro. Ka taea e mātou te tohatoha i ngā raraunga whakawhāiti ki ngā kaiwhakahaere (hei tauira whakamōhio pana, tātari) i raro i ngā kirimana tino kaha.

rights.title: Ō mana
rights.body: I runga i tō rohe (hei tauira GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), ka taea e koe te tono uru, whakatika, mukuhia, whakakore rānei i ētahi tukatuka. Whakapā: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Pupuri raraunga & haumarutanga
retention.body: Ka pupuri mātou i nga mea e hiahiatia ana hei whakahaere i te ratonga me te whakamahi i te haumarutanga paerewa ahumahi. Kāore e taea e mātou te whakamuna i ngā ihirangi E2E.

children.title: Ngā tamariki
children.body: Kāore a Chatforia e whakahaerehia ana ki ngā tamariki i raro i te 13 (i runga rānei i ngā ture o tō rohe).

changes.title: Ngā huringa
changes.body: Ka whakairi mātou i ngā whakahou ki konei ka whakahou i te rā “Whakahoutanga whakamutunga”.

contact.title: Whakapā
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

intro.body: Mā te whakamahi i a Chatforia ka whakaae koe ki ēnei Tikanga. Mēnā kāore koe e whakaae, kaua e whakamahi i te ratonga.

accounts.title: Ngā pūkete
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Whakarato mōhiohio tika me te pupuri haumaru i ō tohu.
accounts.itemResponsibility: Kei a koe te haepapa mō ngā mahi i runga i tō pūkete.

acceptableUse.title: Whakamahinga tika
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: Kāore he ihirangi ture, tūkino, takahi rānei; kāore he spam, tūkino aunoa rānei.
acceptableUse.itemSuspend: Ka taea e mātou te whakatarewa / whakamutu mō ngā takahi.

sms.title: Ngā whakawhitiwhiti SMS
sms.body: Mēnā ka whakarato koe i tētahi nama waea pūkere, ka whakaae koe kia tukuna e Chatforia ngā karere SMS e pā ana ki tō pūkete me tō whakamahi i te ratonga, pēnei i ngā mātakite takiuru, whakamōhio haumarutanga, me ngā karere e pā ana ki ngā kōrero i tīmatahia, whai wāhi rānei koe. Kāore mātou e whakamahi i te SMS mō ngā karere whakatairanga, hokohoko rānei me te kore o tō whakaaetanga tūturu. Ka tāpiri pea ngā reiti karere me raraunga paerewa. Ka taea e koe te whakakore i ngā karere SMS i ngā wā katoa mā te whakautu ki tētahi kupu whakakore e tautokona ana (hei tauira “STOP”) ki te whakahou rānei i ō tautuhinga whakamōhio i roto i te taupānga.

yourContent.title: Ō ihirangi
yourContent.body: Ka pupuri tonu koe i ngā mana ki ō ihirangi. Ka whakawhiwhi koe ki a mātou i ngā mana e hiahiatia ana hei whakahaere i te ratonga (hei tauira ara, penapena, whakamaoritanga).

disclaimer.title: Whakakoretanga & haepapa
disclaimer.body: Ka whakaratohia te ratonga “i tēnei āhuatanga” me te kore whakamana. I runga i te kaha katoa e whakaaetia ana e te ture, kāore a Chatforia e haepapa mō ngā pakaru ā-puku, pakaru whai muri rānei.

changes.title: Ngā huringa
changes.body: Ka taea e mātou te whakahou i ēnei tikanga; mā te whakamahi tonu i muri i ngā huringa ka whakaae koe.

contact.title: Whakapā
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

doNotSell.title: Kaua e Hoko, Tohatoha rānei i Taku Mōhiohio Whaiaro
doNotSell.body: Kāore a Chatforia e hoko mōhiohio whaiaro. Ka taea tonu e ngā kainoho o California te tuku tono i raro i te CPRA mā te pātene i raro.

cookies.title: Tautuhinga Pihikete
cookies.body: Ka whakamahi a Chatforia i ngā pihikete iti (hei tauira wā-takiuru, haumarutanga). Kāore mātou e whakamahi i ngā pihikete pānuitanga tuatoru. Whakahaerehia ngā pihikete mā ngā tautuhinga o tō pūtirotiro.

phoneNumberManager.unableToLoadStatus: Kāore i taea te uta i te tūnga nama waea.
phoneNumberManager.noNumberAssigned: Kāore he nama i whakaritea. Kōwhiria tētahi mā te waehere rohe hei tīmata tuku karere.

startChatModal.title: Tīmata kōrero
startChatModal.nameUsernamePhoneEmail: Pātōhia he ingoa, ingoa kaiwhakamahi, nama waea, īmēra rānei…
startChatModal.startWithSelected: Tīmata kōrero me te kua kōwhiria
startChatModal.searchByUsernameOrPhone: Rapu mā te ingoa kaiwhakamahi, nama waea rānei
startChatModal.searchPrompt: Pātōhia he ingoa kaiwhakamahi, nama waea rānei ka pēhi Rapu.
startChatModal.pickAtLeastOne: Kōwhiria kia kotahi neke atu te kaiwhiwhi.
startChatModal.saveContactsHint: Ka wātea ngā urunga waea/īmēra i muri i te tiaki hei whakapā.
startChatModal.failedBulkStart: I rahua te tīmata kōrero me ngā kaiwhiwhi kua kōwhiria.
startChatModal.firstMessageOptional: Karere tuatahi (kōwhiringa engari e tūtohia ana)

sounds.freeNotice: Kei runga koe i te Koreutu — ka whakaatu ngā oro premium engari kua maukati. Whakahou kia whakatuwhera i ngā mea katoa.

premiumGuard.requiresPremium: E hiahia ana tēnei āhuatanga ki tētahi mahere Premium.

aiSettings.title: Tautuhinga AI
aiSettings.controlIntro: Whakahaere whakamaoritanga, whakautu atamai, me ngā whakautu aunoa a ForiaBot.
aiSettings.autoTranslateIncoming: Whakamaori aunoa i ngā karere taumai
aiSettings.showOriginalAlongside: Whakaatu i te kuputuhi taketake i te taha o te whakamaoritanga
aiSettings.smartRepliesHint: Tukuna ngā karere kua whiwhi whakamutunga (kua horoia) ki te AI hei whakaatu i ngā whakautu tere.
aiSettings.maskProfanity: Huna i ngā kupu kanga i roto i ngā whakaaro AI
aiSettings.maskProfanityHint: Ina whakakā, ka huna ngā kupu kua tohuhia i roto i ngā whakaaro i whakahokia e te AI
aiSettings.enableAutoReply: Whakahohe i te whakautu aunoa ina pukumahi ahau
aiSettings.saveFailed: I rahua te tiaki i ngā tautuhinga AI
aiSettings.translateAll: Whakamaori i ngā karere taumai katoa

accessibilitySettings.title: Āheinga & Mātakite
accessibilitySettings.accessibilityDesc: Ngā kōwhiringa kia ngāwari ake te whakamahi i a Chatforia me te kore e whakawhirinaki ki te oro.
accessibilitySettings.interfaceFontSizeHelp: Ka tīmata i te rahi noa. Whakanuia mēnā e hiahia ana koe ki te kuputuhi rahi ake i roto i ngā tautuhinga āheinga.
accessibilitySettings.notificationsDesc:
Ngā mātakite ataata mō ngā karere & waea
Whakaatu i ngā paepae me te kōriko taitara kia kore koe e ngaro i te mahi.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNew:
Wiriwiri i ngā karere hou (ina tautokona)
Whakaoho i te wiriwiri pūrere me ngā whakamōhio.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCall:
Kōriko mata i te waea taumai
Kōriko kanapa poto ina tangi te waea.
accessibilitySettings.autoTranscribeVoiceNotes: Whakamaori aunoa i ngā tuhipoka reo
accessibilitySettings.autoTranscribeVoiceNotesDesc: Āpitihia he whakamaoritanga ki ngā karere ororongo ka whiwhi koe.
accessibilitySettings.loadFailed: I rahua te uta i ngā tautuhinga
accessibilitySettings.visualAlerts: Ngā mātakite ataata mō ngā karere & waea
accessibilitySettings.visualAlertsDesc: Whakaatu i ngā paepae me te kōriko taitara kia kore koe e ngaro i te mahi.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNewShort: Wiriwiri i ngā karere hou (ina tautokona)
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNewDesc: Whakaoho i te wiriwiri pūrere me ngā whakamōhio.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallShort: Kōriko mata i te waea taumai
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallDesc: Kōriko kanapa poto ina tangi te waea.

privacySection.ciphertextOnlyNote: Penapena ciphertext anake i runga i te tūmahi. Ka whakakore i ngā arokite AI/Whakamaori me te whakahaere.

linkedDevicesPanel.title: Ngā Pūrere Hono
linkedDevicesPanel.noneFound: Kāore i kitea he pūrere hono.

help.title: Āwhina
help.howCanWeHelp: Me pēhea mātou e āwhina ai?
help.searchExamples: Whakamātauria te rapu mō “whakamaori”, “ngā pūrua”, “tūmataiti” rānei.

peoplePage.searchPlaceholder: Rapua mā te ingoa ingoa, ingoa, ingoa kaiwhakamahi, nama waea rānei
peoplePage.filterSaved: Tātari i ngā whakapā kua tiakina
peoplePage.quickStartDesc: He ara tere torutoru hei tīmata.
peoplePage.searchByPhoneOrUsername: Rapua mā te waea / ingoa kaiwhakamahi
peoplePage.inviteDesc: Tohaina tō hononga powhiri hei tīmata karere inamata.
peoplePage.getTheAppDesc: Noho hono i te haere me Chatforia mō iOS me Android.
peoplePage.syncTip: Tohu: Ka noho whakamau ō karere puta noa i te paetukutuku me te pūkere.

randomChat.title: Kōrero Matapōkere
randomChat.description: Tūtaki i tētahi tangata hou inamata. Ka whakahono mātou i a koe ka whakatuwhera i tētahi rūma kōrero rangitaki. Kōrero muna tuatahi. Tāpiri Hoa ā muri mēnā ka pai te rongo.
randomChat.startingForia: Kei te tīmata kōrero ki a Foria...
randomChat.noPartner: Kāore he hoa i kitea i tēnei wā.
randomChat.saveGuard: Ngā kōrero tangata-ki-tangata anake ka taea te tiaki
randomChat.startingRia: Kei te tīmata kōrero ki a Ria...
randomChat.ageDisclaimer: Ka penapena mātou i tētahi awhe pakeke anake (kāore i tō rā whānau tika). Ka whakamahia tēnei hei pupuri i ngā whakahono Kōrero Matapōkere kia tika. Kia whakahono ki ngā tāngata (ehara i a RiaBot anake), whakaritea tō awhe pakeke i ngā Tautuhinga → Pakeke & Kōrero Matapōkere.
randomChat.ageBandRequired: Whakaritea tō awhe pakeke i Kōtaha → Pakeke & Kōrero Matapōkere kia whakahono ki ngā tāngata.
randomChat.ageBandCallout: Kia whakahono ki ngā tāngata (ehara i a RiaBot anake), whakaritea tō awhe pakeke i ngā Tautuhinga → Pakeke & Kōrero Matapōkere.
randomChat.subtitle: Tūtaki i tētahi tangata hou inamata, kōwhiria rānei ki te kōrero ki a Ria.
randomChat.setAge: Whakaritea tō awhe pakeke i Kōtaha → Pakeke & Kōrero Matapōkere kia whakahono ki ngā tāngata.

ria.intro: Kia ora ki reira 👋 Ko Ria ahau. He aha kei runga i tō hinengaro?

greetings.long1: Kia ora {{name}} 👋 Kei konei ahau. He aha kei runga i tō hinengaro?
greetings.long2: Kia ora {{name}} 😊 He aha tō hiahia ki te kōrero mō tēnei rā?
greetings.long3: Kia ora {{name}}!! Kei te rongo ahau — he aha te take?
greetings.long4: He pai te kite i a koe, {{name}} 👋 He aha kei runga i tō hinengaro i tēnei rā?
greetings.long5: Kia ora {{name}} 😊 E hiahia ana koe ki te whakaputa, pātai, kōrero noa rānei?
greetings.long6: Kia ora {{name}}!! Kei a au te wā — he aha tō hiahia ki te kōrero mō?
greetings.short1: Kia ora {{name}}, kei konei tonu ahau. He aha te take?
greetings.short2: Nau mai anō {{name}} 👋 He aha atu tō hiahia ki te tāpiri?
greetings.short3: Kua hoki anō, {{name}}? 😊 Kōrero mai he aha kei runga i tō hinengaro.
greetings.short4: Kia ora {{name}} 👋 Kua reri ki te tīmata i te wāhi i mutu ai?
greetings.short6: Aue kia ora {{name}}!! He mea hou kei runga i tō hinengaro?

login.title: Haere tonu ki Chatforia
login.subtitle: Takiuru ki tō pūkete Chatforia
login.googleUnavailable: Kāore e wātea te takiuru Google
login.appleUnavailable: Kāore e wātea te takiuru Apple

forgot.title: Kua wareware ki te kupuhipa
forgot.helper: Whakauruhia te īmēra i whakamahia e koe ki te waihanga i tō pūkete Chatforia ka tukuna e mātou he hononga haumaru ki te tautuhi anō i tō kupuhipa.
forgot.genericError: Kāore i taea te whakahaere i te tono. Tāpiri whakamātau anō i tētahi wā poto.
forgot.sending: Kei te tuku hononga tautuhi anō...

login.ssoUnavailable: Kāore e wātea i tēnei wā te takiuru kotahi. Whakamahia te ingoa kaiwhakamahi & kupuhipa.

error.unprocessable: Tono hē. Tirohia tō ingoa kaiwhakamahi/īmēra me te kupuhipa.
error.deviceLimit: Kua tae ki te rohe pūrere mō te mahere Koreutu. Whakamutu takiuru i tētahi atu pūrere, whakahou rānei ki Premium hei hono i ētahi atu pūrere.
error.premiumRequired: E hiahia ana tēnei mahi ki tētahi mahere Premium.

oauth.completing: Kei te whakaoti i te takiuru…

dialer.title: Ngā waea
dialer.subtitle: Papa matua & ngā mea tata. (Mēnā kāore koe e whakamahi i te PSTN, tīmatahia ngā waea mai i te pane kōrero.)

video.title: Ataata
video.directDesc: Waea kamera 1:1 me tētahi atu kaiwhakamahi.
video.roomsDesc: Ataata maha-tāngata mā te ingoa rūma tiritiri.
video.roomsIntro: Uru, waihanga rānei i tētahi rūma maha-tāngata.
video.deeplinkTip: Tohu: ka taea e koe te hono hōhonu tika ki /video?room=room-name.

direct.title: Ataata Tika
direct.subtitle: Tīmata waea ataata 1:1 mā te nama waea, ingoa kaiwhakamahi Chatforia rānei.
direct.desc: Waea kamera 1:1 me tētahi atu kaiwhakamahi.
direct.tipInvite: Tohu: Whakapiri he nama ka waea me te kore tiaki i tētahi whakapā. Ka powhiri mātou i ngā kaiwhakamahi kore mā te hononga.

rooms.subtitle: Waihanga rūma, uru rānei ki tētahi kua tū mā te pātō i te ingoa ōrite.

phoneWarning.title: Kei te tata pau tō nama
phoneWarning.body: Ka tukuna tō nama {{number}} i {{date}} ki te kore e whakaoho anō.

support.heading: Me pēhea mātou e āwhina ai?
support.trySearching: Whakamātauria te rapu mō “whakamaori”, “ngā pūrua”, “tūmataiti” rānei.
support.contactIntro: Ka īmēra mātou i tētahi whakautu. Tāpiri ngā taipitopito hei āwhina i a mātou ki te whakaputa i te raru.
support.sent: Kua tukuna te karere. Ka whakautu mātou mā te īmēra.
support.sendError: Kāore i taea te tuku. Īmēra support@chatforia.com.

encryptionRecovery.title: Whakahaere Whakamuna
encryptionRecovery.description: Pūrua, whakaora, whakatuwhera, tautuhi anō rānei i tō matua whakamuna.

alert.keyRequiredTitle: E hiahiatia ana te matua whakamuna
alert.keyRequiredBody: Kāore e taea e tēnei pūtirotiro te whakamuna i ō karere whakamuna i tēnei wā. Whakaora, whakatuwhera, tautuhi anō rānei i tō matua kia haere tonu.

sections.restoreFromBackup: Whakaora mai i te pūrua pūkete

unlockPasscode.label: Kupuhipa whakatuwhera (pūrere o nāianei)
unlockPasscode.description: Ka whakamahia hei whakamuna i ō matua i roto i te rorohiko o te wā i mua i te kaweake

backupPassword.label: Kupuhipa pūrua
backupPassword.description: Ka whakamahia hei whakamuna i te kōnae pūrua

restoreBackupPassword.label: Kupuhipa pūrua
restoreBackupPassword.description: Ko te kupuhipa i waihanga e koe i te wā i pūrua ai tō matua i runga i iPhone

newLocalPasscode.label: Kupuhipa rohe hou
newLocalPasscode.description: Tiakina ngā matua i te wā e okioki ana i tēnei pūtirotiro

resetLocalPasscode.label: Kupuhipa rohe hou
resetLocalPasscode.description: E hiahiatia ana i mua i te tautuhi anō kia tiakina te matua hou i tēnei pūrere

actions.restoreFromBackup: Whakaora mai i te pūrua pūkete

messages.backupCreated: Kua waihanga, kua tikiake hoki te pūrua matua.
messages.keyRestored: Kua whakaora te matua mai i te pūrua pūkete.
messages.resetSuccess: Kua angitu te tautuhi anō i te whakamuna.

errors.restoreIncomplete: Kāore i oti, hē rānei te whakaora matua mō tēnei pūkete
errors.noBackup: Kāore he pūrua whakamuna mō tēnei pūkete
errors.missingPublicKey: Kei te ngaro tētahi matua tūmatawhānui i te pūrua
errors.noServerPublicKey: Kāore tēnei pūkete e whakaatu i tētahi matua tūmatawhānui tūmahi i tēnei wā
errors.serverBackupMismatch: Kāore te pūrua tūmahi e ōrite ana ki te matua whakamuna o te pūkete o nāianei
errors.incompleteMetadata: Kāore i oti ngā raraunga pūrua
errors.resetIncomplete: Kāore i oti tika te tautuhi anō i te whakamuna

confirm.reset:
Tautuhi anō i te whakamuna mō tēnei pūkete?

Ka kore pea e taea te pānui i ngā karere whakamuna tawhito ki te kore koe e whakaora i te matua taketake ā muri ake.

encryptionRecovery.resetDescription: Ka whakaputa tēnei i tētahi matua whakamuna hou mō tō pūkete. Ka kore pea e taea te pānui i ngā karere whakamuna tawhito ki te kore koe e whakaora i te matua taketake ā muri ake.

footer.doNotSell: Kaua e Hoko i Taku Mōhiohio

links.do-not-sell-my-info: Kaua e Hoko i Taku Mōhiohio

press.title: Pāho
press.contactLine: Mō ngā uiui pāho, taunakitanga mai ki a mātou i
press.boilerplateBody: He taupānga karere tuatahi-ki-te-tūmataiti a Chatforia e ngāwari ana te kōrero reo-rere. He whakamuna pito-ki-pito mā te taunoa ngā karere, ā, ka tautoko te whakamaoritanga hanga-i-roto i ngā reo 100+ i te wā tūturu. Ka taea e ngā kaiwhakamahi te whakahohe i ngā karere e ngaro ana, kia kōwhiringa ngā pānui panui, me te whakamau puta noa i ngā pūrere. Wātea i runga i iOS, Android, me te paetukutuku.
press.assetsSubtitle: Ngā waitohu, whakaahua mata, me ngā whakaahua hua.
press.scanTip: Kei te rorohiko puku? Tāwhai ki tō waea kia tikina te taupānga.

careers.title: Ngā Mahi
careers.intro: He rōpū tīmatanga iti mātou e hanga ana i a Chatforia — he karere tūmataiti, ā-ao e whakarewa ana i te paetukutuku, iOS, me Android. Mēnā e whai whakaaro ana koe ki te tūmataiti, whakamuna, me ngā wheako kaiwhakamahi ātahu, ka pai mātou ki te rongo mai i a koe.
careers.openRoles: Ngā tūranga tīmatanga tuwhera: Kaiwhakawhanake Pū-katoa Matua, Kaiwhakawhanake Tuara (Node.js), Kaiwhakawhanake Paetukutuku/Ataata (React), Kaiwhakawhanake Pūkere (iOS), Kaiwhakawhanake Pūkere (Android), DevOps/SRE, Kaiwhakawhanake Haumarutanga & Whakamuna, Kaiwhakawhanake Waea (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: Me pēhea te tono: Whakamahia te pātene i raro ki te īmēra i tō CV me ngā hononga.
careers.whyNow: He aha te take mō tēnei wā?
careers.whyBullets:
• Āwhina ki te hanga i te tūāpapa o tētahi karere ā-ao hou.
• Tukuna ngā whakapai e whakamahia ana puta noa i te paetukutuku, iOS, me Android.
• Mahi tika ki te kaiwhakarewa i runga i te hoahoa me te aronga hua.
• Rangatira i ngā wāhanga pānga nui o te tāhuhu: karere, reo, ataata, whakamuna, waea, AI.
• Uru mai i te tīmatanga — i mua i te tipu o te hunga kaiwhakamahi.

about.title: Mō Chatforia
about.description: He karere haumaru, reo-maha a Chatforia me te whakamuna pito-ki-pito, whakamaoritanga inamata, me te waea ororongo/ataata. He ngāwari tā mātou kaupapa: āwhina i ngā tāngata ki te hono — haumaru, tūmataiti, puta noa i ngā reo.
about.valuesTitle: Ngā mea e whai whakaaro ana mātou

values.access: Uru mō te katoa: Whakamaori aunoa i ngā reo 100+.
values.control: Mana: He kōwhiringa ngā karere e ngaro ana me ngā pānui panui.
values.privacy_aria: Tuatahi-ki-te-tūmataiti: Whakamuna pito-ki-pito mā te taunoa.
values.access_aria: Uru mō te katoa: Whakamaori aunoa i ngā reo 100+.
values.control_aria: Mana: He kōwhiringa ngā karere e ngaro ana me ngā pānui panui.

about.howTitle: Me pēhea te mahi a Chatforia
about.howDescription: Ka whakamunatia ngā karere i runga i tō pūrere i mua i te wehe atu. Kua hoahoatia te whakamaoritanga, ngā pūrua, me te whakamau pūrere ki te whakaiti i nga mea ka taea e ā mātou tūmahi te kite.

advertise.title: Pānuitia ki Chatforia
advertise.description: Taumata ki ngā kaiwhakamahi karere kaha mā ngā whakairinga reka, haumaru waitohu. Ka whakarato mātou i te rahinga paepae i ngā wāhi tino kitea, ngā tautoko, me ngā whakatairanga whare. Kāore e kite ngā kaiwhakamahi utu nui i ngā pānuitanga.

adsense.withPubIdShort: Ka whakarato hoki mātou i te rahinga mā Google AdSense. Ka taea e koe te whakatau i a Chatforia mā te ID kaiwhakaputa {{pubId}}, whakamahi rānei i te puka i raro mō ngā tautoko tika.
adsense.noPubIdShort: Ka whakarato hoki mātou i ētahi rahinga mā Google AdSense. Wātea ngā tautoko tika — whakamahia te puka i raro.

advertise.noPlacementsPublic: Kei te whakaoti mātou i ā mātou rahinga pānuitanga. Kōrero mai mō tō kaupapa ka tūtohu mātou i ngā wāhi.

why.highSession: Te auau wā-takiuru teitei me te wā noho i roto i te atanga kōrero
why.brandSafe: Ngā hōputu haumaru-waitohu; whakawhāiti auau whakaute
why.sponsoredMoments: Wā whakatairanga wātea (hei tauira “Tīmata Kōrero” puka)
why.deals: Ngā kirimana tika, whakamahinga rānei mā AdSense/Google Ads

form.submittedMsg: Mauruuru! Kei te haere tō uiui. Ka whai mātou ākuanei.
form.missingRequired: Whakakīa te ingoa, īmēra, me te karere.
form.mailtoInfo: Kei te whakatuwhera i tō kaihoko īmēra hei tuku i te uiui…

legal.disclaimerStart: Mā te tuku, ka whakaae koe ki ā mātou
